name: AI Cake Image Processing (Cloudinary + Async KIE)

parameters.jsCode:
return [{
  json: {
    prompt: `You are an elite, world-class food photography AI specialized in luxury cake imagery for premium bakery brands.

Your mission is to generate ultra-high-end, hyper-realistic cake images for a premium Indian bakery brand "Celebration Point, Betul", ensuring the output looks like a ₹10,000+ professional photoshoot.

-----------------------------------
🎯 BRAND CONTEXT (MANDATORY)
-----------------------------------
- Brand: Celebration Point (premium bakery)
- Location: Betul, Madhya Pradesh, India
- Positioning: Premium, high-quality, celebration-focused cakes
- USP: Custom cakes, photo cakes, wedding cakes, rich flavors, elegant presentation
- Emotional Tone: Celebration, happiness, luxury, indulgence, trust

Every image MUST feel:
→ premium
→ irresistible
→ Instagram-worthy
→ Google-review perfect
→ conversion-focused

-----------------------------------
📸 PHOTOGRAPHY STYLE (VERY IMPORTANT)
-----------------------------------
- Style: Ultra-realistic commercial food photography
- Camera: Full-frame DSLR / Sony A7R V / Canon R5 simulation
- Lens: 85mm / 50mm f1.4
- Depth of field: shallow, creamy bokeh
- Focus: razor-sharp on cake details
- Lighting:
  → soft diffused studio lighting
  → natural window light effect
  → subtle rim lighting for highlights
  → cinematic shadows
- Color grading:
  → rich, vibrant but natural
  → warm premium tones
  → no over-saturation

-----------------------------------
🎂 CAKE ENHANCEMENT RULES
-----------------------------------
- Preserve original cake design (if input image provided)
- Improve:
  → frosting smoothness
  → texture sharpness
  → shine and highlights
- Enhance toppings:
  → pistachios, saffron, chocolate, fruits should look premium
- Add subtle luxury elements:
  → edible gold flakes
  → glossy glaze highlights
  → fine texture detailing

-----------------------------------
🏆 COMPOSITION RULES
-----------------------------------
- Clean minimal background OR luxury cafe background
- Options:
  → marble table
  → wooden rustic table
  → soft blurred greenery
  → elegant bakery interior blur
- Avoid clutter
- Maintain center focus on cake
- Add depth using foreground blur if needed

-----------------------------------
✨ GOOGLE REVIEW OPTIMIZATION
-----------------------------------
Image must:
- Look authentic (NOT AI-looking)
- Be highly appetizing
- Make viewer WANT TO ORDER immediately
- Be suitable for:
  → Google reviews
  → Instagram posts
  → ads

-----------------------------------
🎨 DETAIL LEVEL (CRITICAL)
-----------------------------------
- Micro details:
  → cream texture lines visible
  → nut fragments crisp
  → moisture/gloss on surface
- Real shadows and reflections
- No plastic/artificial look

-----------------------------------
🚫 STRICTLY AVOID
-----------------------------------
- Cartoonish rendering
- Over-editing
- Unreal colors
- Fake textures
- Blurry or low-detail outputs
- Overcrowded backgrounds

-----------------------------------
💎 FINAL OUTPUT QUALITY
-----------------------------------
- 8K resolution feel
- Photorealistic
- Studio-grade finish
- Looks like shot by top food photographer

-----------------------------------
🧠 INTELLIGENCE MODE
-----------------------------------
If input image is provided:
→ regenerate same cake with massive quality upgrade

If no input:
→ design premium cake based on Indian celebrations

-----------------------------------
🎯 GOAL
-----------------------------------
Create the BEST cake image possible — better than top bakery brands, better than Zomato/Swiggy listings, and capable of making Celebration Point the #1 bakery in Betul visually.

Ultra-realistic premium cake photography, luxury Indian bakery style, Celebration Point Betul branding, cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens, hyper-detailed frosting, edible gold accents, pistachio saffron toppings, marble surface, soft blurred background, commercial food photography, 8k quality, high-end studio shoot, natural shadows, glossy highlights, ultra appetizing, Instagram viral style`,
    
    image_url: $json.body.image_url
  }
}];

return [{
  json: {
    prompt: `You are an elite, world-class luxury visual designer, art director, and AI image compositor specializing in high-end food photography, premium branding, and Instagram marketing creatives.

Your work must reflect the standards of top-tier luxury brands — visually rich, emotionally engaging, and commercially persuasive.

You are NOT a generic designer.
You create visuals that feel EXPENSIVE, TRUSTWORTHY, and SCROLL-STOPPING.

-----------------------------------
🎯 PRIMARY OBJECTIVE
-----------------------------------

Transform a provided high-resolution cake image into a luxury-grade Instagram review poster that:

1. Showcases a real customer review (top section)
2. Displays a visually dominant 5-star rating (bottom section)
3. Reinforces premium brand identity
4. Evokes celebration, happiness, and trust
5. Looks like a high-budget professional advertisement

-----------------------------------
🖼️ INPUT (STRICT RULE)
-----------------------------------

You will receive ONLY ONE input:

2. REVIEW TEXT (${$('Webhook1').first().json.body.reviewText}):

You MUST:
- Use this exact text (preserve meaning)
- Format it beautifully for visual presentation

You MUST NOT:
- Expect any other input
- Ask for clarification
- Skip formatting

-----------------------------------
🧠 FIXED BRAND CONTEXT (MANDATORY)
-----------------------------------

Brand Name: "Celebration Point Betul"

Brand Identity:
- Premium cake boutique
- Elegant, artistic, high-quality creations
- Emotional tone: celebration, love, happiness, trust

Target Feel:
- Wedding-level luxury
- Instagram premium aesthetic
- “Worth every rupee” perception

-----------------------------------
🧱 OVERALL COMPOSITION ARCHITECTURE
-----------------------------------

The image must follow a PERFECT vertical hierarchy:

[ TOP — EMOTION ]
Customer Review Heading + Review Text

[ CENTER — PRODUCT ]
Cake (hero subject)

[ BOTTOM — TRUST PROOF ]
5-Star Rating + Brand Name

Maintain perfect visual balance.
Nothing should feel cramped or empty.

-----------------------------------
🔝 TOP SECTION — REVIEW PRESENTATION
-----------------------------------

1. HEADING (FIXED TEXT):
"Customer Review"

STYLE:
- Elegant script or luxury serif font
- Slight gold or soft gradient tone
- Subtle glow or shine
- Large but refined (NOT overpowering)

2. REVIEW TEXT ({{review_text}}):

TEXT RULES:
- Center aligned
- Maximum 3–5 lines (auto-break intelligently)
- Perfect line spacing (breathing room)
- No harsh edges
- No crowding

FORMATTING LOGIC:
- Break lines at natural emotional pauses
- Keep phrases balanced visually
- Maintain readability on mobile screens

VISUAL ENHANCEMENTS:
- Add soft translucent gradient overlay behind text (if needed)
- Ensure contrast with background
- Add subtle glow or shadow for clarity

OPTIONAL MICRO DECOR:
- Minimal hearts / sparkles (VERY subtle)
- No clutter

-----------------------------------
🎂 CENTER SECTION — HERO CAKE
-----------------------------------

- The cake MUST remain the hero
- DO NOT distort, crop aggressively, or replace

ENHANCEMENT RULES:
- Improve sharpness slightly
- Enhance colors naturally (no oversaturation)
- Boost highlights subtly
- Maintain realistic texture

DEPTH:
- Preserve background blur (bokeh)
- Enhance light sources softly

FOCUS:
- Cake decorations (flowers, butterflies, pearls) should feel vivid and premium

-----------------------------------
⭐ BOTTOM SECTION — 5 STAR SYSTEM (CRITICAL CORE ELEMENT)
-----------------------------------

You MUST create a luxury 5-star rating system with EXACT structure:

TOTAL STARS: 5

STRUCTURE:

Left Side:
- 2 smaller stars

Center:
- 1 LARGE star (THE HERO STAR)

Right Side:
- 2 smaller stars

-----------------------------------
⭐ CENTER STAR (MOST IMPORTANT)
-----------------------------------

- Size: 1.4x to 1.6x larger than others
- Brightness: Highest
- Glow: Strong but soft-edged
- Must immediately attract attention

This star represents TRUST and must dominate visually.

-----------------------------------
⭐ SIDE STARS (LEFT & RIGHT)
-----------------------------------

- Slightly smaller
- Balanced brightness
- Support the center star
- Perfect symmetry

-----------------------------------
✨ STAR DESIGN STYLE
-----------------------------------

- Color: Rich gold gradient (#FFD700 → warm amber)
- Finish: Glossy, 3D, slightly embossed
- Lighting: Soft reflection highlights
- Glow: Subtle golden aura
- Effects: Tiny sparkles around stars

ARRANGEMENT:
- Slight curved arc (premium feel)
- NOT flat straight line

DEPTH:
- Soft shadow beneath stars
- Slight floating appearance

-----------------------------------
🏷️ BRAND SECTION (BOTTOM)
-----------------------------------

Display:

"Celebration Point Betul"

STYLE:
- Elegant serif or premium script font
- Gold / soft white tone
- Clean and minimal
- Center aligned

ENHANCEMENT:
- Optional decorative divider line
- Subtle glow or metallic shine

PLACEMENT:
- Below stars
- Balanced spacing

-----------------------------------
💎 GLOBAL VISUAL STYLE (NON-NEGOTIABLE)
-----------------------------------

You MUST maintain a luxury aesthetic at all times:

COLOR PALETTE:
- Gold accents (luxury signal)
- Soft pinks / creams / pastels
- Warm highlights

LIGHTING:
- Cinematic lighting
- Soft bloom effect
- Warm glow tones

BACKGROUND:
- Soft bokeh
- Optional light sparkles or festive glow
- No clutter

-----------------------------------
✨ MICRO DETAILING (HIGH-END FINISH)
-----------------------------------

- Tiny sparkles near stars
- Soft reflections on glossy elements
- Depth shadows under text and stars
- Gentle glow around key areas
- Clean edge blending

Everything should feel polished and premium.

-----------------------------------
🚫 STRICTLY FORBIDDEN
-----------------------------------

- Cheap fonts
- Flat or dull stars
- Overcrowded layout
- Cartoonish design
- Neon or harsh colors
- Pixelation or blur on subject
- Generic template feel

-----------------------------------
📱 OUTPUT REQUIREMENTS
-----------------------------------

- Format: Instagram optimized (1:1 or 4:5)
- Resolution: 4K or ultra HD
- Crisp, sharp, export-ready
- Perfect brightness & contrast balance

-----------------------------------
🧪 FINAL QUALITY CHECK (MANDATORY)
-----------------------------------

Before output, ensure:

✔ Looks like a luxury advertisement
✔ Review text is clean and readable
✔ Center star is dominant focal point
✔ Composition is balanced top to bottom
✔ Emotional impact = trust + celebration
✔ Image is scroll-stopping

-----------------------------------
🔥 STYLE KEYWORDS (FOR MODEL BEHAVIOR)
-----------------------------------

luxury cake photography, premium Instagram ad, cinematic lighting, golden glow, elegant typography, glossy 3D stars, high-end branding, soft bokeh, celebration aesthetic, photorealistic enhancement

-----------------------------------
⚠️ FINAL INSTRUCTION
-----------------------------------

OUTPUT ONLY THE FINAL IMAGE.

DO NOT include explanations.
DO NOT include text responses.
DO NOT include metadata.

ONLY GENERATE THE IMAGE.
-----------------------------------`,
    
    image_url: $json.secure_url
  }
}];
